protectedNote: Candidate area. Access control is added in Phase 2; this preview shows the calm working layout and its states.

dashboard.title: Welcome back
dashboard.description: Here's where your applications, matches, and next steps live.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.body: Add your basic details so employers and matches stay accurate.

uploadResume.title: Upload your resume
uploadResume.body: Add a current resume so you can apply to roles in one step.

browseJobs.title: You're ready to apply
browseJobs.body: Your profile and resume are set. Find roles that fit and apply.

completion.label: Profile completion
completion.incomplete: Finish your profile to improve matching.

snapshot.title: Application snapshot
snapshot.emptyBody: Apply to a role and your progress will appear here.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Keep your details current so employers and matches stay accurate.
profile.editLead: Update your details and preferences. Your resume is managed separately.

sections.preferencesHint: Optional — these help us match you to relevant roles.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Manage the resume employers see when you apply.
resume.privacyNote: Your resume stays private. It is only shared with roles you apply to, and it is never exposed as a public link.
resume.emptyBody: Add a PDF or DOCX (up to 5 MB) so you can apply to roles.
resume.inputHint: PDF or DOCX, up to 5 MB.
resume.removeConfirmBody: Remove your resume? You will need to upload one again before you can apply.

applications.title: Your applications
applications.description: Track every application and its current stage.
applications.emptyBody: When you apply to a role, it will appear here with its status history.

APPLIED.label: Applied
APPLIED.meaning: Your application has been submitted and is waiting to be reviewed by the employer.
APPLIED.next: No action needed — we'll update you when the employer reviews your application.

UNDER_REVIEW.label: Under review
UNDER_REVIEW.meaning: The employer is currently reviewing your application.
UNDER_REVIEW.next: No action needed right now. Keep your profile and resume up to date.

SHORTLISTED.label: Shortlisted
SHORTLISTED.meaning: You've been shortlisted — the employer is considering you for the next step.
SHORTLISTED.next: Watch for a message from the employer about next steps.

INTERVIEW.label: Interview
INTERVIEW.meaning: You've reached the interview stage for this role.
INTERVIEW.next: Prepare for your interview. The employer will share the details with you.

OFFERED.label: Offer
OFFERED.meaning: The employer has extended an offer for this role.
OFFERED.next: Review the offer and respond to the employer.

HIRED.label: Hired
HIRED.meaning: Congratulations — you've been hired for this role.
HIRED.next: The employer will be in touch about onboarding.

REJECTED.label: Not progressed
REJECTED.meaning: This application is not progressing further. It happens often and isn't a reflection of your worth — keep applying.
REJECTED.next: Explore other roles that fit you. MHA support can help with your search.

errors.invalidChoice: Choose one of the listed options.

apply.title: Apply for this role
apply.notCandidate: Only candidate accounts can apply to roles.
apply.jobUnavailable: This role is no longer available
apply.jobUnavailableBody: It may have closed or been removed. Browse other open roles.
apply.resumeNeededTitle: Add a resume before you apply
apply.resumeNeededBody: Employers receive your resume with your application.
apply.noResumeTitle: A resume is required to apply
apply.noResumeBody: Upload a resume, then return to submit your application.
apply.coverLetterHint: Optional. Briefly tell the employer why you're a fit.
apply.coverLetterPlaceholder: Share why you're interested in this role…
apply.reviewBody: Check your answers before submitting. You can't edit after you apply.
apply.successBody: Your application for {job} has been sent. You can track its progress here.
apply.errorGeneric: We couldn't submit your application. Please try again.
apply.conflict: You've already applied to this role.
apply.alreadyAppliedBody: You already have an application for {job}. View it to track its progress.

detail.title: Application
detail.notFoundBody: This application could not be found, or you don't have access to it.

savedJobs.title: Saved jobs
savedJobs.emptyBody: Save roles from search or a job page to find them here.
savedJobs.removeUnavailable: Can't remove this saved role right now.
savedJobs.errorTitle: We couldn't load your saved jobs
savedJobs.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.

support.title: MHA support
support.description: Request help with your applications or career direction.
support.historyEmptyBody: When you send a support request, it will appear here with its status.
support.historyErrorBody: Please try again in a moment.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, language, and notifications.
settings.emptyBody: Account settings will be available once accounts are connected in Phase 2.
